heroSubtitleComplete: Results are shown below. Reset to run another live search.
heroSubtitleInitial: Liveness on one probe image, then 1:N face search (live).
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Either option works for this demo.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and align your face in the frame
uploadSubtitle: Select an image file from your device instead
uploadSecondary: JPEG or PNG from your gallery
apiRefLinkSuffix: (liveness on the probe image, then 1:N search).
apiRefBody: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send a single raw base64 probe in image (no data URL prefix), required os (ANDROID, IOS, or DESKTOP), liveness and match thresholds, and search_mode. This demo uses DESKTOP.
apiRefEndpointDesc: Runs anti-spoofing / liveness first; if it passes, performs similarity search against enrolled faces.
bulletApiClient: This demo uses searchLivePerson from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bulletLivenessFail: Failures below the liveness threshold may return an error response (see API docs for error shapes).
